name: Chocolate 20 Minute Cake (Sheet Cake) [4-i]
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the sugar, flour, and salt.
2. In a saucepan, mix the butter, Crisco, cocoa powder, and water. Heat over high heat until boiling.
3. Pour the boiling mixture into the sifted ingredients, then stir in the buttermilk, vanilla extract, eggs, and baking soda.
4. Transfer the batter to an ungreased sheet pan and bake at 400°F for 25-30 minutes.
5. Chocolate Icing:
a. In another saucepan, mix the butter, milk, cocoa powder, and vanilla extract until boiling.
b. Add powdered sugar gradually while continuing to stir until smooth.
c. Spread the icing over the hot cake once it has cooled slightly.
Source: Abilene Cook Book
Posted by Ken Strei
